en: A PRAYER OF MOSES, THE MAN OF GOD. Lord, you have been our dwelling place in all generations.
zh: 主啊！你世世代代作我們的居所。

en: Before the mountains were brought forth, or ever you had formed the earth and the world, from everlasting to everlasting you are God.
zh: 群山尚未生出， 大地和世界你未曾造成， 從永遠到永遠，你是 神。

en: You return man to dust and say, "Return, O children of man!"
zh: 你使人歸回塵土， 說：“世人哪！你們要歸回塵土。”

en: For a thousand years in your sight are but as yesterday when it is past, or as a watch in the night.
zh: 在你看來， 千年好像剛過去了的昨天， 又像夜裡的一更。

en: You sweep them away as with a flood; they are like a dream, like grass that is renewed in the morning:
zh: 你使世人消逝，像被洪水沖去； 他們好像睡了一覺； 他們又像在早晨生長的草，

en: in the morning it flourishes and is renewed; in the evening it fades and withers.
zh: 早晨發芽生長， 晚上就凋萎枯乾。

en: For we are brought to an end by your anger; by your wrath we are dismayed.
zh: 我們因你的怒氣而消滅， 因你的烈怒而驚恐。

en: You have set our iniquities before you, our secret sins in the light of your presence.
zh: 你把我們的罪孽擺在你面前， 把我們的隱惡擺在你臉光之中。

en: For all our days pass away under your wrath; we bring our years to an end like a sigh.
zh: 我們一生的日子都在你的震怒中消逝， 我們度盡的年歲好像一聲歎息。

en: The years of our life are seventy, or even by reason of strength eighty; yet their span is but toil and trouble; they are soon gone, and we fly away.
zh: 我們一生的年日是七十歲， 如果強壯，可到八十歲， 但其中可誇耀的，不過是勞苦愁煩； 我們的年日轉眼即逝， 我們也如飛而去了。

en: Who considers the power of your anger, and your wrath according to the fear of you?
zh: 誰曉得你怒氣的威力， 誰按著你該受的敬畏曉得你的忿怒呢？

en: So teach us to number our days that we may get a heart of wisdom.
zh: 求你教導我們怎樣數算自己的日子， 好使我們得著智慧的心。

en: Return, O LORD! How long? Have pity on your servants!
zh: 耶和華啊！要到幾時呢？求你回心轉意， 求你憐恤你的僕人。

en: Satisfy us in the morning with your steadfast love, that we may rejoice and be glad all our days.
zh: 求你使我們早晨飽嘗你的慈愛， 好使我們一生一世歡呼喜樂。

en: Make us glad for as many days as you have afflicted us, and for as many years as we have seen evil.
zh: 你使我們受苦和遭難的年日有多久， 求你使我們喜樂的日子也有多久。

en: Let your work be shown to your servants, and your glorious power to their children.
zh: 願你的作為向你的僕人彰顯， 願你的威嚴向他們的子孫顯明。

en: Let the favor of the Lord our God be upon us, and establish the work of our hands upon us; yes, establish the work of our hands!
zh: 願主我們的 神的恩慈臨到我們身上； 願你為我們的緣故，堅立我們手所作的工； 我們手所作的工，願你堅立。
